content: Sidebar: hide Asset Registry from non-Superadmin; hide Orange List from Supervisor/Approving Supervisor
Backend: GET /api/schedules/supervisor/{user_id}?from_date=&to_date= → returns due tasks asset-category-wise based on assigned assets + frequency
Backend: GET /api/schedules/approving-supervisor/{user_id}/supervisors → list of supervisors at this approving sup's stations
Backend: POST /api/admin/transfer-supervisor → bulk reassign all assets from old→new supervisor
Frontend: Add API client methods for new schedules endpoints
Frontend: Redesign SchedulesPage with role-based views (Supervisor: date range + category-wise; Approving Sup: supervisor list; Admin/Superadmin: pick supervisor)
Frontend: Admin Panel — add 'Transfer Supervisor' section for bulk reassignment
